title: Super pack
description: This the modified and more from old pack ue it and be a fan of it
body:
This time I present you a great PvP pack. This is a texture pack gives a simple texture for the armor,sword and tools in minecraft it's gives you new look and new and simple way of pvp armor

Requirements

Optifine required otherwise this pack doesn't work properly.
changes in minecraft after applying the pack.
changes are:-
1)Netherite Tools
2)Netherite Sword
3)Diamond Tools
4)Diamond Sword
5)Iron Tools
6)Iron Sword
7)Shield
8)Gold Tools
9)Gold Sword
10)Stone Tools
11)Stone Sword
14)Netherite Armor
15)Diamond Armor

this pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.
version supported form- 1.16-1.20.1
make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack all versions have separate files
Enjoy the "super PvP Pack".

THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
